---
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      #title-block-header.quarto-title-block.default .quarto-title-meta {
        color: #ffffff;
      }
      .quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
        height: 0;
      }
      #title-block-header {
        background-image: url(img/cordillera_wide_blur_b.jpg);
        background-size: cover;
        background-position-y: top;
        height: 180px;
      }
      </style>
---
